differential_diagnoses: Genetic dilated cardiomyopathy (e.g., lamin A/C mutation)
next_steps: Extended ambulatory ECG monitoring to screen for high-grade AV block or ventricular arrhythmias
Evaluation for implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death
Long-term systemic anticoagulation due to apical aneurysm and prior embolic event
Family screening including echocardiography and ECG for first-degree relatives
Genetic testing for cardiomyopathy-associated gene panel
